flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Rust College are 28% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($32.3k vs $44.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rust College fell 56% between 2021 and 2024 (26.9% → 11.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 42% at Rust College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (428 vs 741).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rust College fell 39% between 2021 and 2024 (768 → 467).
